incident_details.short_description: Account import creates duplicate customers despite duplicate detection
incident_details.description: After a bulk Account import, users found multiple duplicate customer accounts with the same account name and tax registration number. Duplicate detection warnings were not triggered during the import.

resolution.root_cause: Duplicate detection was enabled globally, but the Account table rule for Tax Registration Number had not been published, so match codes were not available for the import scenario.
resolution_steps: Reviewed duplicate detection settings at organization, table, and operation level.
Created an Account duplicate detection rule using normalized Account Name and Tax Registration Number.
Published the rule so Dataverse generated match codes for existing Account records.
Re-ran the import in a sandbox with duplicate detection enabled and verified duplicate warnings were produced.
Merged confirmed duplicate Accounts and documented the import checklist for future data loads.

source_inspiration.title: Detect duplicate data with match codes and rules
Detect duplicate data using the Web API
